creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1


Dear Ingo Petersen,

thanks for your PR submission.
Sorry for my late response, i was really busy with private business and my 
day job the last weeks.

Anyway, here is a short response.
The port, like nearly any other port in the tree, installs to LOCALBASE by 
default (normally /usr/local), but it depends on you to specify a 
different location. Just change to the ports directory (normally 
/usr/ports/sysutils/nut) and run 'make install clean PREFIX=/usr' or any 
other PREFIX you want.
The port is totally PREFIX-clean, so all installed files are recorded 
correctly and you can uninstall the port afterwards without any leftovers.

I/the port can't guess what partition setup you use and where you want to 
have it installed. Therefor we have the flexible ports framework, to give 
you the possibility to override some of the defaults.

Please try the above steps and tell me if this is okay and works for you.

Thanks and kind regards
Joerg

- -- 
The beginning is the most important part of the work.
 				-Plato
